parameters.command:
set -e
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
echo "SECURITY_AUDIT_START"
echo "checked_at=$NOW"
echo "--- UPDATES ---"
systemctl is-active unattended-upgrades 2>/dev/null || true
if [ -f /var/run/reboot-required ]; then echo reboot_required=yes; else echo reboot_required=no; fi
apt list --upgradable 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | head -n 25 || true
